candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Wrong section; non-current rather than current assets.
Balancing line and wrong section.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct match for cash and cash equivalents on the balance sheet.
Matches ending cash numerically, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.
Cash balance but beginning-of-period, not the balance-sheet cash line.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash line as required.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Wrong section; non-current liabilities.
Balancing line and wrong section.

variables.notes: Selected the reported current liabilities total.

candidates.why: Primary balance-sheet line for current maturities of debt; fits short-term debt/current portion of long-term debt and excludes leases.
Also represents current maturities of debt, but appears to be a supplemental maturity disclosure duplicating the main current debt line.
Could represent short-term debt, but appears blank in preview and less clearly reported than the main current portion debt line.
Could include broader current financial liabilities, potentially too broad for STD.

variables.notes: Chose the main balance-sheet current debt line. Excluded lease-related rows and avoided double counting with supplemental maturity disclosures such as 'LT Debt Maturing within 1 Year'.

candidates.why: Most plausible current tax payable/current tax liability label on the liabilities side of the balance sheet.
Deferred tax is non-current tax accounting, not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Deferred tax liability, not taxes payable.

variables.notes: Selected 'Income Tax' as the likely current tax payable line, but the same label also appears in the assets section, so the mapping is ambiguous without row position context.

candidates.why: Best available reported balance-sheet line corresponding to property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets, net.
Gross tangible assets would be less preferred than a reported net PPE/tangible assets line.
Only leased subset, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, plant and equipment - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not the reported PPE total.

variables.notes: Under IFRS/Nordic reporting, tangible assets net is the closest reported equivalent to total/net PPE.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total assets line.

candidates.why: Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities.
